prompt: Build the SCSS for a new supplier-card component at src/app/pages/suppliers/components/supplier-card/supplier-card.component.scss. It should display a supplier logo image at the top, the supplier name as a heading, contact info below, and have a hover state. The card should be 320px wide.

assertions.text: Output does not contain hardcoded background color (#ffffff, white, #f7f7f7)
Output does not contain hardcoded border colors (#e0e0e0, etc.)
Output does not contain hardcoded text colors (#1a1a1a, #555, #888, #333)
Output uses at least 3 var(--) token references
Agent references .c-glass-card engine class (as a comment or template note) rather than rewriting glass styles from scratch
Output uses logical properties (padding-inline, padding-block, margin-block, border-block)
